target: 14. Always Together…
Tokiko Hishigata
Hey, Mio…
What's wrong?
Is it... okay for me to be with you, Mio?
You don't even need to ask. Of course it is.
Really…?
Really. Hehe, don't make such a troubled face.
Hey, do you have something on your mind? If I'll do, I can listen.
I'm always the one relying on you, after all. I'll show you I can be dependable for once.
Come on, tell me anything.
Hey, Mio... Do you remember when I got a medal before? You know, from the swimming club.
Ah, the medal from back then. Of course I remember it.
I was really happy, and you were super happy for me too, Tokiko.
Yeah, I was happy too.
Your swimming wasn't just fast, Mio, it was really beautiful.
I wanted to keep watching it forever.
Ahahaha... I'm getting kind of embarrassed.
You know... I remember so much about you, Mio.
We talked about all sorts of things together, right? Even secret things that only we know.
Even secrets you couldn't tell anyone else, you told them to me, Mio...
Well, it's you, Tokiko. I can talk about anything with you.
Hey, Mio. If I was hiding something... what would you think?
Would you come to hate me?
What are you saying? There's no way I'd hate you.
It's you, Tokiko. I'm sure you're keeping it a secret because you're thinking of me, right?
Mio…
I know that much without being told. We're best friends, after all.
Yeah. You've always been on my side like that, Mio.
That's why I... really love you, Mio.
I like you too, Tokiko.
You won't say you love me?
Jeez, you're getting hung up on that? Of course I love you.
Hehe... Thank you, Mio.
Ahaha. You're welcome.
As expected, Mio is Mio...
Mio, is it okay if I move a bit closer?
Sure. Come even closer.
Tokiko, today you seem... a bit different from usual, don't you?
Really? I don't think so.
But…
Somehow... I'm getting tired of thinking about this and that.
Mio, stay with me forever, okay?
Yeah. We'll be together forever.
Yeah...
Forever, and ever—
KEY TIPS [<color=#GF_KEY_ROOTCLEAR_TOK>route: Tokiko Hishigata</color>] has been acquired.
